hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams unify provider outputs and preserve audit-ready evidence to streamline regulatory inspection workflows and maintain clear review trails.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness weakens across scattered evidence
problem_description: Compliance teams managing digital asset workflows struggle to maintain a complete and traceable audit trail when provider outputs and case documentation remain disconnected. This fragmentation slows regulatory inspection preparation and makes compiling defensible evidence for AML reviews more difficult.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes provider checks, case documentation, reviewer actions and audit logs into one compliance workflow to help VASPs maintain a traceable and defensible audit trail for regulatory inspection readiness.
workflow_title: From alerts to regulatory inspection evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes AML alerts through review, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to support compliance readiness for regulatory inspections.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and audit evidence to help compliance teams prepare effectively for regulatory inspections.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured provider orchestration and audit-ready evidence to meet bank due diligence and scalable enterprise deployment requirements.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams with a connected platform to connect provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases, regulatory rule updates, and reporting across digital asset compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support regulatory inspections?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures alerts, cases, evidence and regulatory updates into auditable workflows that help compliance teams prepare for regulatory inspections with clear traceability and documentation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs, provider results and evidence packages to support audit readiness and provide a defensible compliance record during reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and reporting tools into one operational compliance layer without requiring replacement of current providers.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows without replacing the underlying systems.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready workflows for regulatory inspections
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs, case evidence and decision logs to support regulatory inspection readiness.
